subcodes.first_line: O Father of Virtues, the epistle that Your Honor composed in refutation of him who, in rejecting Him, rejected God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابی الفضائل رساله ای که آنحضرت در رد من رد علی الله مرقوم نموده بودند
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @service to others; to the Cause of God
